Bash("C:\\Users\\86152\\AppData\\Local\\Programs\\Python\\Python312\\python.exe" -c "
import pymysql, json
conn = pymysql.connect\(host=''localhost'', user=''root'', password=''Lby15224516691'', database=''condenser_db'', charset=''utf8mb4''\)
cur = conn.cursor\(pymysql.cursors.DictCursor\)
cur.execute\(''SELECT * FROM process_dict ORDER BY id''\)
rows = cur.fetchall\(\)
for r in rows:
    print\(json.dumps\(r, ensure_ascii=False, default=str\)\)
conn.close\(\)
")

Bash("C:\\Users\\86152\\AppData\\Local\\Programs\\Python\\Python312\\python.exe" -c "
with open\(r''C:\\Users\\86152\\Desktop\\易德\\condenser-miniprogram\\pages\\condenser\\condenser.wxml'', ''r'', encoding=''utf-8''\) as f:
    lines = f.readlines\(\)

# Delete lines 562-1070 \(1-indexed\), keep line 561 and line 1071+
new_lines = lines[:561] + lines[1070:]

with open\(r''C:\\Users\\86152\\Desktop\\易德\\condenser-miniprogram\\pages\\condenser\\condenser.wxml'', ''w'', encoding=''utf-8''\) as f:
    f.writelines\(new_lines\)

print\(f''Deleted {1070-561} lines \(562-1070\). New total: {len\(new_lines\)}''\)
")
